news.t: ETF investors flee cash-like government bond funds, favor riskier assets in ‘bullish buying'
Harbor Capital Advisors Launches Long-Short Equity ETF

overview.description: The Harbor Long-Short Equity ETF (LSEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the HFRX Equity Hedge index. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth. The portfolio will generally be 40%-60% net long in US large- and mid-cap companies, with the possibility of extending to 150% long LSEQ was launched on Dec 4, 2023 and is issued by Harbor.

data.title: ETF investors flee cash-like government bond funds, favor riskier assets in ‘bullish buying'
data.text: Hello! In this week's ETF Wrap, you'll get a look at flow data showing recent “bullish buying behavior” from investors, as well as funds to consider before 2024 hits.

data.title: Harbor Capital Advisors Launches Long-Short Equity ETF
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors, Inc. ("Harbor"), the asset manager that continues to curate a select suite of actively managed ETFs, has now launched the Harbor Long-Short Equity ET...
